body:
Closes final runtime and Docker blockers after PR #550 merge.

## Fixes
- Include platform_core in package discovery so OpenAPI import path works after pip install -e .
- Keep apps/web/public present so Docker COPY does not fail.
- Make apps/web Docker build resilient.
- Include platform_core in compile check.

## Validation
- python scripts/check_openapi_contract.py
- docker build -t dealix-apps-web-ci apps/web
- docker build -t dealix-api-ci .
- docker build -t dealix-worker-ci -f Dockerfile.worker .
- docker build -t dealix-watchdog-ci -f Dockerfile.watchdog .

commits.messageHeadline: fix: close final launch blockers after platform merge

title: fix: close final launch blockers after platform merge
